name: fulcrum
description: Personal software hub for installing, updating, and launching apps.

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron
scripts.package: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && cd electron && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.release: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && cd electron && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win --publish always
